metadata.description: Meta-plugin for converting Claude Code skills to deterministic YAML workflow patterns

plugins.name: hiivmind-blueprint-author
plugins.description: Authoring tools for converting Claude Code skills to deterministic YAML workflow patterns. Create, analyze, convert, and generate workflow-based skills.

plugins.name: hiivmind-blueprint-ops
plugins.description: Operations tools for validating and maintaining YAML workflow patterns. Validate workflows, upgrade schema versions, and manage type definitions.
